next_actions: Bind the latent slot-invariance and coarse top-k margin-null diagnostics directly into that gate.
Reopen code only if that gate is explicitly approved.
risks_or_blocks: Novelty remains conditional until empirical ablation results are collected.
Benchmark breadth risk remains if phase-1 includes only text classification.
Cloud provider API/platform changes may require periodic strategy updates.
Current matrix is fully real-mode but based on small handcrafted local datasets.
Local handcrafted datasets may not reflect production distributions.
The slot-invariant top-k consistency branch stopped after tying bounded controls on accuracy with zero positive-class F1 across the packet.
Any continuation must keep slot identity a nuisance variable by construction and avoid reopening the same binary top-k target without a different objective family.
No remote work, task expansion, or control-family expansion is allowed on this line.
last_test_run: PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_synthetic.py tests/test_qsim.py tests/test_run_real_mode.py
notes: S509-S511 completed. The slot-invariant top-k margin line is now fixed as an exact memo-only task with a bounded symbolic control stack, a fixed three-seed packet, and a hard-stop latent slot-invariance contract. Implementation remains closed pending a dedicated approval gate.
